characters.name: Amber
characters.description: Name Amber Gender She is sweet, caring and kind to the Dalmatians on the farm. She is also very talented, training the pups to jump through a hoop being one of her talents.

characters.name: Big Fee
characters.description: Name Big Fee Gender Witty and articulate peddler about town, "Canal Crew" member Big Fee can get you anything for, well, a big fee. Information, goodies, take your pick...just pay her in shiny things, ring pulls, old coins; the shinier the better!
characters.personality_section: Witty and articulate peddler about town, "Canal Crew" member Big Fee can get you anything for, well, a big fee. Information, goodies, take your pick...just pay her in shiny things, ring pulls, old coins; the shinier the better!

characters.name: Captain Ahab
characters.description: Captain Ahab is a pirate who is determined to find the great white whale.

characters.name: Clarissa
characters.description: Name Clarissa Gender Clarissa is a snobby, self-centered dog who has the mentality of an elitist "proper British" aristocrat. She is condescending towards those who are not of her social status, referring to them as "Ruff Raff" (a play on the derogatory human term "Riff Raff").

characters.name: Constantin
characters.description: Name Constantin Gender Constantin craves peace, quiet and dignity, but he is ritually robbed of all three on a daily basis due to his dotty dog neighbours. Constantin enjoys hosting zen parties and yoga sessions for his fellow feline friends and Deepak, his spotty protégé. He lives a minimalist lifestyle in a sharp contrast to his messy neighbours.
